title: justicia physogaster
intro: Justicia physogaster, also known as Physostigma or Obechie, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in the tropical regions of West Africa. The plant's leaves, roots, and seeds contain a compound called physostigmine, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to dilate pupils and slow down the heart rate. Physostigmine has been used to treat conditions such as glaucoma, and it also has potential health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease and improving cognitive function. The herbal preparations of Justicia physogaster typically involve the use of the plant's leaves or seeds, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
